metadata.title: Diego Remicio — Senior Angular/TypeScript Engineer
metadata.description: Portfolio of Diego Remicio. 9+ years building enterprise web apps for United Airlines, JPMorgan, and WeightWatchers. Angular, TypeScript, React, Node.js.

hero.name: Diego Remicio
hero.title: Senior Angular/TypeScript Engineer
hero.description: 9+ years building enterprise web apps for United Airlines, JPMorgan & WeightWatchers
hero.location: Based in Brazil (UTC−3) · Peruvian National · Open to relocation
hero.availability: Available for Contract & Full-time · Remote or On-site · US/EU timezone overlap
hero.workAuthText: Based in Brazil (UTC−3) with full US/EU timezone overlap. Open to remote work globally and on-site relocation. Eligible for EU Highly Qualified Professional permits.

about.title: About
about.p1: I’m a Senior Angular/TypeScript engineer with 9+ years building enterprise-grade web applications. I’ve worked on pilot operations platforms at United Airlines, financial tools at JPMorgan, and CRM systems at WeightWatchers — always focused on authentication architecture (OAuth/OIDC), UI performance at scale, and shared component libraries that serve multi-team platforms.
about.p2: I accelerate delivery through AI-augmented development (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot) while maintaining the architectural judgment AI tools can’t replace. My thesis project integrated LLM APIs into an educational platform with controlled prompts and A/B feature gating.
about.p3: Currently based in São Paulo, Brazil. Trilingual: Spanish (native), English (advanced), Portuguese (professional).

taller.bullet1: Architected shared Angular component library across 3 platform modules for 7–9 engineers, eliminating duplicated UI code
taller.bullet2: Delivered Trip Trade UI with 28 filter criteria types and strict business rules by pilot type (Lineholder/RSV)
taller.bullet3: Implemented full OAuth/OIDC for Oracle Access Manager: auth service, guards, interceptor, silent renew
taller.bullet4: Improved UI responsiveness for 7+ page datasets using OnPush, lazy loading, caching, and virtual scroll
taller.bullet5: Reduced developer onboarding from ~7 to ~5 days via auto-published component docs

freelance.bullet1: C Gestiona — React + Vite marketing site with Markdown blog, Decap CMS, Netlify Functions
freelance.bullet2: Clave de tu Ser — Next.js + Prisma + NextAuth platform; reservation CRUD admin; transactional emails (Resend)

oktana.bullet1: Implemented end-to-end CRM features across Angular frontend and Node/Express services
oktana.bullet2: Resolved intermittent subscription bug via RxJS retry strategy, reducing incidence to near-zero
oktana.bullet3: Strengthened reliability through improved TypeScript/RxJS patterns and DB integrations

softvision.bullet1: Led FE pod, mentored 3 juniors. Shipped MVP state management with RxJS, introduced NgRx for KPI matrix

globant.bullet1: Migrated financial calculator UIs (ActionScript → Angular) with pixel-accurate parity. >85% test coverage.

aiMath.title: AI Math Learning Platform
aiMath.description: Angular app integrating Claude/GPT APIs for adaptive math exercises with controlled LLM behavior. Feature-flagged AI for A/B study design — production-grade patterns including error handling, rate limiting, and response validation.
